targets.rawSql: SELECT source_system AS metric, count(*)::int AS value FROM audit.events WHERE ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp_utc) AS time, source_system AS metric, count(*)::int AS value FROM audit.events WHERE ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE result='SUCCESS')::int AS "SUCCESS", count(*) FILTER (WHERE result='FAILURE')::int AS "FAILURE", count(*) FILTER (WHERE result='ERROR')::int AS "ERROR" FROM audit.events WHERE ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring})
SELECT user_id, count(*)::int AS events FROM audit.events WHERE ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Off-hours LOGINs (UTC hour < 6 or > 18)
panels.description: Phase 3 strategy A.3 — events outside business hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp_utc, user_id, user_ip, source_system, action, result FROM audit.events WHERE action='LOGIN' AND (hour_utc < 6 OR hour_utc > 18) AND ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring}) ORDER BY timestamp_utc

panels.title: Top exports (rows_exported / rows_affected)
panels.description: Phase 3 strategy A.5 — large exports / mass DB ops.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp_utc, user_id, source_system, action, resource, COALESCE((details->>'rows_exported')::int, (details->>'rows_affected')::int) AS rows FROM audit.events WHERE (details ? 'rows_exported' OR details ? 'rows_affected') AND ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring}) ORDER BY rows DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 25

panels.title: Foreign IPs (NOT 10.0.0.0/8 and NOT 192.168.0.0/16)
panels.description: Phase 3 strategy B.4 — external IP addresses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp_utc, user_id, user_ip, source_system, action, result FROM audit.events WHERE user_ip IS NOT NULL AND NOT (user_ip << inet '10.0.0.0/8' OR user_ip << inet '192.168.0.0/16') AND ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring}) ORDER BY timestamp_utc

panels.title: Failed LOGINs per IP
panels.description: Phase 3 strategy A.2 — brute-force / credential stuffing signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT user_ip, count(*)::int AS failed_logins, count(DISTINCT user_id)::int AS distinct_users, min(timestamp_utc) AS first_seen, max(timestamp_utc) AS last_seen FROM audit.events WHERE action='LOGIN' AND result='FAILURE' AND ($__timeFilter(timestamp_utc)) AND source_system IN (${source_system:sqlstring}) GROUP BY user_ip ORDER BY failed_logins DESC

list.name: source_system
list.label: Source system
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source_system FROM audit.events ORDER BY 1
